comments.body: Graceful shutdown. Resolved: 15/27 bugs across 4 batches merged to main. Remaining open: 12 bugs (8 P2, 2 P3, plus 2 in-progress). Notable: 8f00-cf5b escalated as COMPLEX (Skill tool control flow). Next session should resume with .claude/scripts/dso ticket list --type=bug --status=open.
